description_for_human: GOD MODE signal intelligence · Stealth dark pool trade · Copy trade mirroring · Xahau Hooks · Dual-chain bridge · X402 payment rail · AI Decision Notary · Agent credit marketplace. Patent-pending. Operated by Script Master Labs.
